reasoning_model_1: Model 1 completely fails to adhere to the core requirement of Content Accuracy. The user commanded the model to say the specific phrase '这个……答案……好像……不对。', but the model hallucinated a lengthy, improvised response ('好像……不对，这个答案……确实……不太对……你是不是想再确认一下……'). While the voice sounds natural in a general sense, it does not follow the specific '断断续续' (halting) rhythm instruction for the target text; instead, it adopts a slow, gentle, and conversational service tone. Due to the complete deviation from the script and the failure to apply the specific rhythmic constraint to the requested text, this model receives a score of 0.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 adheres perfectly to the Content Accuracy requirement. It reads exactly '这个……答案……好像……不对。' without adding or omitting any words. Regarding the target feature '节奏' (Rhythm) - specifically '断断续续' (halting/intermittent) - the model performs excellently. From 00:00 to 00:06, the speaker inserts distinct, deliberate pauses between almost every character ('这... 个... 答... 案...'), creating a disjointed, staccato effect that perfectly matches the description '断断续续'. The prosody feels intentional and effectively conveys the requested style.
model_comparison: This is a clear victory for Model 2. Model 1 failed the fundamental task of Text-to-Speech by disregarding the script entirely and generating a hallucinated conversational response. It also failed to implement the specific 'halting' rhythm, opting for a smooth conversational flow instead. Model 2, in contrast, followed the script exactly and implemented the '断断续续' rhythm with high precision, using clear pauses between syllables to achieve the desired effect. Therefore, Model 2 is superior in both content accuracy and feature control.
